description_long: This research institute is a large, rectangular building with a modern, institutional appearance. The facade features a prominent central entrance with a flat canopy supported by columns, flanked by wide glass windows that suggest office or laboratory spaces. The roof is flat and the structure is divided into several internal sections, visible through the open roof design, indicating multiple rooms or labs. The exterior walls are primarily a light gray, with darker accents along the roofline and around the windows. The building sits on a raised platform with steps leading up to the main entrance, and a perimeter walkway surrounds the structure. The overall design is functional and minimal, with an emphasis on symmetry and accessibility.
description: A large, modern research institute with a flat roof, wide glass windows, and a prominent central entrance, surrounded by a raised platform and perimeter walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a flat canopy, wide glass windows, and steps leading up to the building.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the internal room divisions and the depth of the building, with the entrance canopy visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back wall and the internal room layout, with no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the internal divisions and the side profile of the entrance canopy.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway features a wide, flat canopy supported by two columns, with a set of broad steps leading up to double doors. The entrance is centrally located and flanked by large glass windows, providing a welcoming and accessible approach. The design is minimal and functional, with no visible decorative elements.
